args:
Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Core API Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/hono-base.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/client/client.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Core API Read/Write Ledger

## src/index.ts

- Public surface: Exports Hono class and re-exports types from ./types, Context, ContextVariableMap, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions
- Internal names noticed: Hono import from ./hono, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
- Plain-English summary: Module entry point that exports the main Hono class and all public types for users
- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports Hono from ./hono, Env/ErrorHandler/Handler/MiddlewareHandler/Next/NotFoundResponse/NotFoundHandler/ValidationTargets/Input/Schema/ToSchema/TypedResponse from ./types, Context from ./context, HonoRequest type from ./request, InferRequestType/InferResponseType/ClientRequestOptions from ./client

## src/types.ts

- Public surface: Defines core type interfaces Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, HTTPResponseError
- Internal names noticed: PassThroughOnException, AbstractHono, Context, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, HonoRequest
- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./request, ./http-exception, ./utils/http-status
- Plain-English summary: Type definitions file containing all the interfaces and types used throughout Hono
- Copy-safe detail: Defines HTTPResponseError extending Error, ErrorHandler taking Error or HTTPResponseError, PassThroughOnException abstract method, Context with error property and optional FetchEvent/ExecutionContext, HonoRequest, Input interface for validation targets, Schema interface with paths array, Env interface extending ContextVariableMap, ValidationTargets type

## src/hono.ts

- Public surface: Exports Hono class that extends HonoBase
- Internal names noticed: HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
- Plain-English summary: Main Hono class that initializes with SmartRouter as default router
- Copy-safe detail: Hono class extends HonoBase<E, S, BasePath>, constructor accepts HonoOptions with optional router parameter, defaults to SmartRouter with [new RegExpRouter(), new TrieRouter()], SmartRouter is chosen via options.router ?? new SmartRouter

## src/hono-base.ts

- Public surface: Provides onError method for error handling and handleOnNotFound
- Internal names noticed: errorHandler, passThroughOnException, #handleError, compose, notFoundHandler
- Imports or neighbors: ./types, ./context, ./compose, ./http-exception, ./utils/http-status
- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class handling routing, error handling, and middleware composition
- Copy-safe detail: errorHandler private method catches errors and returns c.text('Internal Server Error', 500), onError<E> method accepts ErrorHandler and sets this.errorHandler, #handleError checks if err instanceof Error then returns errorHandler, notFoundHandler private method, onNotFound<E> method sets this.notFoundHandler, app.onError calls this.onError with handler, app.notFound calls this.onNotFound with handler, .get/post/put/delete/patch methods on prototype, .route method on prototype

## src/context.ts

- Public surface: Exports Context class with methods like set, get, setHeader, appendHeader, newResponse
- Internal names noticed: ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, error, req, res, finalized
- Imports or neighbors: ./types, ./request, ./http-exception, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/jwt, ./utils/cookie
- Plain-English summary: Request context class providing access to request properties, response, and execution environment
- Copy-safe detail: Context class has error: Error | undefined property, req: HonoRequest property, res: Response | undefined property, finalized: boolean property, set(k: string, v: unknown) stores variables in c._var, get(k: string) retrieves from c._var, newResponse(status, statusText, body, headers, cookies) returns Response, setHeader(name, value) sets header, appendHeader(name, value) appends header, setCookie(name, value) adds cookie via c.res.headers.append, deleteHeader(name) removes header, getHeader(name) gets header value

## src/request.ts

- Public surface: Exports HonoRequest class extending Request with routeIndex and other helpers
- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, json, text, body
- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./utils/cookie
- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper that provides Hono-specific helpers like json(), text(), body parsing
- Copy-safe detail: HonoRequest class extends Request with reqHeader alias for headers, json<T>() method, text() method, body getter that returns undefined if req.raw is null and has been accessed

## src/request/constants.ts

- Public surface: Exports GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
- Internal names noticed: No internal names
- Imports or neighbors: None
- Plain-English summary: Module exporting a unique symbol for match result
- Copy-safe detail: GET_MATCH_RESULT: unique symbol = Symbol()

## src/utils/body.ts

- Public surface: Exports parseBody function for parsing request body data
- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, ParseBody, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
- Imports or neighbors: ../request
- Plain-English summary: Utility for parsing form data and URL-encoded bodies with dot and all options
- Copy-safe detail: parseBody<T> function accepts HonoRequest or Request with optional Partial<ParseBodyOptions>, returns Promise<T>, ParseBodyOptions has all: boolean for array handling and dot: boolean for nested object parsing, handles multipart/form-data and application/x-www-form-urlencoded content types

## src/compose.ts

- Public surface: Exports compose function for middleware composition
- Internal names noticed: dispatch, ErrorHandler, Context, Next, NotFoundHandler
- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
- Plain-English tracking: middleware: [[Function, unknown], unknown][] | [[Function]][], onError?: ErrorHandler<E>, onNotFound?: NotFoundHandler<E>, returns ((context: Context, next?: Next) => Promise<Context>), dispatch(i) function recursively handles middleware at index i, checks if next() called multiple times, sets context.error on error with onError handler, sets context.res when response exists
- Plain-English summary: Composes middleware functions in Koa-style stack pattern
- Copy-safe detail: compose<E> middleware: ErrorHandler | NotFoundHandler, returns context -> Promise<Context>, dispatch tracks index to prevent multiple next() calls, catches errors and invokes onError, invokes onNotFound when no handler found at end of chain, sets context.res if response exists after handler runs

## src/http-exception.ts

- Public surface: Exports HTTPException class extending Error
- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode, getResponse
- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
- Plain-English summary: Exception class for returning standardized HTTP error responses
- Copy-safe detail: HTTPExceptionOptions has res?: Response, message?: string, cause?: unknown, constructor(status: ContentfulStatusCode = 500, options?), this.res = options?.res, this.status = status, getResponse() returns this.res with new headers if provided or creates new Response with this.message

## src/client/index.ts

- Public surface: Exports hc function, parseResponse, DetailedError, types InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse
- Internal names noticed: UnionToIntersection, BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, Hono
- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./types, ./utils/cookie, ./utils/types, ./utils/http-status
- Plain-English summary: Client module entry point exporting hc helper and client types
- Copy-safe detail: exports hc from ./client, exports parseResponse and DetailedError from ./utils, exports types from ./types including InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode

## src/client/client.ts

- Public surface: Exports hc function for creating typed HTTP client proxies
- Internal names noticed: ClientRequestImpl, Client, hc, createProxy, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, DetailedError, ClientRequestOptions, Fetch, ValidationTargets, FormValue, UnionToIntersection
- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils, ../utils/http-status
- Plain-English summary: Creates hc() function that builds proxy-based typed HTTP client
- Copy-safe detail: createProxy(callback, path) creates proxy that intercepts property access, ClientRequestImpl has private url, method, buildSearchParams, queryParams, pathParams, rBody, cType properties, fetch method builds URL, query params, body, headers from args, ClientRequestImpl fetch calls (opt?.fetch || fetch) with constructed body, method, headers, ClientRequestImpl created with buildSearchParamsOption, mergePath combines base url and path, replaceUrlParam substitutes named parameters, replaceUrlProtocol swaps http/ws, removeIndexString strips /index from url, deepMerge recursively merges objects

## src/client/types.ts

- Public surface: Defines Client, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse, InferResponseType, InferRequestType
- Internal names noticed: BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, Fetch, ObjectType, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode
- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./utils
- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for the HTTP client interface
- Copy-safe detail: Client<T, P> interface with $get, $post, $put, $delete, $patch, ws methods, Fetch function with url, path, params, query, body, form, header, cookie, json args, ClientRequestOptions with fetch, headers, buildSearchParams, webSocket, init properties, ClientResponse has data, status, statusText, type, headers, url, body, FetchResult, ObjectType with key and value properties, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode for filtering by status code

## src/client/utils.ts

- Public surface: Exports mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse, DetailedError
- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, ObjectType, isObject, fetchRP
- Imports or neighbors: ./fetch-result-please, ./types, ../utils/http-status
- Plain-English summary: Utility functions for URL manipulation, object merging, and response parsing
- Copy-safe detail: mergePath(base, path) removes trailing/leading slashes and concatenates, replaceUrlParam(urlString, params) replaces /:key with value, buildSearchParams(query) creates URLSearchParams from object, replaceUrlProtocol switches http/ws, removeIndexString removes /index from url, isObject returns true for objects not arrays, deepMerge<T> recursively merges objects, parseResponse<T> infers type and throws DetailedError on non-ok responses, DetailedError extends Error with detail, code, log, statusCode properties

## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts

- Public surface: Exports fetchRP function, DetailedError class
- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, jsonRegex, detectResponseType
- Imports or neighbors: None
- Plain-English summary: Modified fetch utility that smartly parses response and throws errors
- Copy-safe detail: nullBodyResponses set [101, 204, 205, 304], fetchRP awaits Response, detects if hasBody, calls detectResponseType to get json or text, stores result in _fetchRes._data, throws DetailedError if not ok with status and detail, DetailedError constructor takes message and options with detail, code, log, statusCode, jsonRegex tests for application/json content-type, detectResponseType extracts content-type, returns json if matches regex else text

## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts

- Public surface: Exports fire function for registering Hono app in Service Worker
- Internal names noticed: HandleOptions, handle, Hono, Env, Schema, FetchEvent
- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./handler
- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter that wraps Hono app with fetch event handler
- Copy-safe detail: fire<E, S, BasePath> app: Hono<E, S, BasePath>, options?: HandleOptions, calls addEventListener('fetch', handle(app, options)) with @ts-expect-error comment, handle imported from ./handler, fire exported from module

## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts

- Public surface: Exports handle function, HandleOptions type
- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent, Handler, handle, FetchEvent
- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./types, ../http-status
- Plain-English summary: Service Worker request handler that wraps Hono app in respondWith
- Copy-safe detail: HandleOptions has optional fetch: typeof fetch property, handle<E, S, BasePath> app, opts with fetch defaults to globalThis.fetch.bind(globalThis), returns (evt) => { evt.respondWith(async () => { const res = await app.fetch(evt.request, {}, evt), if opts.fetch and status === 404 returns opts.fetch(evt.request), returns res }()), FetchEvent extends ExtendableEvent with clientId, handled, preloadResponse, request, resultingClientId, respondWith, ExtendableEvent has waitUntil method

## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

- Public surface: Exports FetchEvent interface
- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent, FetchEvent, clientId, handled, preloadResponse, request, resultingClientId, respondWith, waitUntil
- Imports or neighbors: None
- Plain-English summary: TypeScript interface for Service Worker FetchEvent
- Copy-safe detail: ExtendableEvent extends Event with waitUntil(f: Promise<any>) method, FetchEvent extends ExtendableEvent with clientId: string, handled: Promise<void>, preloadResponse: Promise<any>, request: Request, resultingClientId: string, respondWith(r: Response | PromiseLike<Response>) method
